deployment.name: Geo Q&A — per-tool registry (advanced)
deployment.description: Per-tool detail version of the Public Geospatial Q&A preset: one server-side ReAct agent traverses a 7-stage discovery pipeline (parse_datetime → geocode → search_collections → select_collection → search_items → compute_stats → render_map). Each stage is modelled as a separate registry entry with realistic STAC-shape result payloads so per-tool RETURN SHAPE changes (templated ↔ freeform) move the headline cost the same way the paper's templating lever does. Default is fully templated — flip any tool to freeform to see its contribution.

anchor_query.example: Did monthly NO2 over New York City change from October to December 2021?
anchor_query.notes: Anchor matches the bench-measured templated fixed prefix (system prompt + tool schemas, 3,369 tok via tiktoken o200k_base, within 0.8% of the measured 3,342). Output is small because the agent echoes templated tool-return messages verbatim rather than composing fresh prose.

parse_datetime.label: parse_datetime
parse_datetime.description: Validate and normalize a date range to ISO-8601 interval.

geocode.label: geocode
geocode.description: Resolve a place name to a bounding box + admin geometry.

search_collections.label: search_collections
search_collections.description: Semantic search over catalog collections; returns Top-K with descriptions, summaries, providers, asset metadata.

select_collection.label: select_collection
select_collection.description: Record the user's collection + variable selection.

search_items.label: search_items
search_items.description: Enumerate catalog items inside the AOI and datetime window. Freeform shape returns full STAC item objects (geometry polygons, 15+ properties fields, assets, links).

compute_stats.label: compute_stats
compute_stats.description: Per-item raster zonal statistics (mean, median, min, max, percentiles, 16-bin histograms).

render_map.label: render_map
render_map.description: Build a raster tile URL for the selected items + AOI.

agents.label: Geo Q&A Agent (server-side ReAct)
agents.description: Single-agent ReAct tool loop. Reads the user query, traverses the 7-stage pipeline with confirmation gates, returns a templated answer. Output-suppressed: the LLM echoes each tool's short status message verbatim rather than composing fresh prose. NOTE: the simulator bridge ignores per-agent input_tokens and recomputes from its own slider state, so the headline number is an approximation rather than the bench's measured ~$1K/mo; the lever (per-tool RETURN SHAPE) is what this preset demonstrates accurately.

mixed.label: Mixed (40% full · 30% rag · 15% partial · 10% refusal · 5% heavy)
